Q4633.description: A white field with a copper-orange map silhouette of the island of Cyprus centered, with two crossed green olive branches below.

Q12188.description: Black and white horizontal stripes (four black, five white) in the fly, with a white canton at the hoist bearing eleven black ermine spots.

Q12989.description: A yellow field bearing a black lion rampant with red claws and tongue, centered.

Q12990.description: Three equal vertical bands of black, yellow, and red.

Q16611.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and red.

Q18983.description: The flag of the U.S. state of Pennsylvania consists of a blue field on which the state coat of arms is displayed.

Q18993.description: A blue field bearing the obverse of the Virginia state seal: a standing female figure (Virtue) holding a spear and a sheathed sword, with a defeated king lying at her feet. The motto "SIC SEMPER TYRANNIS" appears below.

Q19000.description: A vertical blue band at the hoist bearing a single large white five-pointed star, alongside two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red on the fly.

Q19016.description: A dark blue field bearing the state coat of arms: a shield showing a masted ship and a sloop on the Hudson River with a grassy shore and mountains, sun rising behind them.

Q19373.description: A blue field bearing a white palmetto tree in the center and a white crescent in the upper hoist corner.

Q19374.description: A blue field with the state arms in the center: a white pelican vulning herself (piercing her breast to feed her chicks) on a nest. A white ribbon below bears the state motto "UNION JUSTICE CONFIDENCE" in blue.

Q19379.description: A vertical blue band at the hoist bearing a white five-pointed star between the gold letters "N" and "C", with two gold scrolls reading "MAY 20th 1775" above and "APRIL 12th 1776" below. The fly is divided into a red horizontal band (top) and a white horizontal band (bottom).

Q19427.description: A navy blue field with gold lettering "STATE OF OREGON" arched above the state escutcheon (showing a covered wagon, mountains, an ocean sunset, ships, and a banner reading "THE UNION") encircled by 33 gold stars. The date "1859" appears in gold below.

Q26491.description: A white field with a large red Saint George's cross extending to the edges, with a smaller red Bolnisi cross in each of the four white quadrants.

Q30768.description: The national flag of Timor-Leste (bandeira nacional de Timor-Leste; bandeira nasionál) consists of a red field with the black isosceles triangle based on the hoist-side bearing a white five-pointed star in the center superimposed on the larger yellow triangle, also based on the hoist-side, that extends to the center of the flag.

Q33213.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), blue, and orange.

Q34494.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Southern Cross (five white stars: four seven-pointed and one smaller five-pointed) below a white crown of Saint Edward.

Q36005.description: A horizontal triband of red (top), white, and red. The white middle stripe is twice the height of each red stripe and bears a green cedar of Lebanon tree centered, touching both red stripes.

Q41327.description: A green field with a vertical red stripe near the hoist containing five traditional carpet medallions (göls) woven in red, black, yellow, and white with an olive branch at its base, plus a white crescent and five small white stars in the upper hoist of the green portion.

Q41673.description: Three equal horizontal bands of saffron, white, and green, with a navy-blue 24-spoke wheel (Ashoka Chakra) centered on the white band.

Q42436.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white above red.

Q42537.description: Thirteen alternating red and white horizontal stripes, with a blue rectangle in the upper-left corner containing fifty white stars arranged in nine rows.

Q42876.description: Three equal vertical bands of green, white, and red.

Q43175.description: A red disc centered on a white field.

Q45136.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and black, with three red five-pointed stars in a row centered on the white band.

Q46008.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), blue (double width), and red, with a large white disc centered on the blue band.

Q46585.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue.

Q46835.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and red.

Q47891.description: A blue Nordic cross on a white field, offset toward the hoist.

Q48160.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black, red, and gold.

Q48409.description: A red field with a black double-headed eagle centered.

Q51401.description: Six equal horizontal stripes of red (top), orange, yellow, green, blue, and violet.

Q60149.description: A white Nordic cross on a red field, offset toward the hoist.

Q79198.description: A square flag with two equal vertical bands of yellow (hoist) and white, the white half charged with the emblem of the Holy See: the crossed gold and silver keys of Saint Peter beneath a papal tiara.

Q79874.description: A white field with the Islamic Shahada inscribed in black Arabic calligraphy across the center.

Q81286.description: A yellow Nordic cross on a light blue field, offset toward the hoist.

Q81471.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), black, and white.

Q81477.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), green, and red.

Q81526.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow, and red, with the national coat of arms centered on the yellow band.

Q81676.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist quarter, a large white seven-pointed Commonwealth Star below the Union Jack, and five white stars on the fly representing the Southern Cross (one small five-pointed star and four larger seven-pointed stars).

Q81952.description: A red field with a white crescent and a white five-pointed star next to it, both in the center.

Q81970.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and green.

Q82194.description: A green field with a yellow rhombus in the center containing a blue disc depicting a starry sky and the Southern Cross, spanned by a curved white band inscribed "ORDEM E PROGRESSO" in green.

Q82205.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and orange.

Q82236.description: Three equal horizontal bands of bright blue (top), red, and green, with a white crescent and a white eight-pointed star centered on the red band.

Q83149.description: A blue Nordic cross outlined in white on a red field, offset toward the hoist.

Q83278.description: A dark blue field overlaid by the red and white crosses of Saint George, Saint Andrew, and Saint Patrick, forming three superimposed crosses on a blue background.

Q83392.description: Two equal vertical bands of green (hoist) and white, charged in the center with a red crescent and a red five-pointed star.

Q93335.description: A sky blue field with a red Nordic cross outlined in white, offset toward the hoist.

Q101472.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

Q101769.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), yellow, and blue.

Q102198.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black, with a green isosceles triangle on the hoist side.

Q102392.description: A white saltire (diagonal cross of Saint Andrew) on a blue field.

Q102939.description: Three equal horizontal bands of turquoise blue (top), white, and turquoise blue, with five blue five-pointed stars arranged in a quincunx (four corners and center) on the white band.

Q102944.description: The national flag of Cape Verde (bandeira nacional de Cabo Verde) was adopted on 22 September 1992, replacing the flag adopted during independence.

Q102960.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and green.

Q102967.description: Three equal vertical bands of orange (hoist), white, and green.

Q102987.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and red, with a white square panel in the center bearing the Haitian coat of arms (a trophy of weapons atop a green hill with a royal palm topped by a Phrygian cap; the motto "L'UNION FAIT LA FORCE" below).

Q102993.description: The flag of Eswatini was adopted on 6 October 1968 after Eswatini (then known as Swaziland) gained its independence from the United Kingdom one month before. The design by King Sobhuza II features a black and white shield called the Nguni shield, with a staff and two spears, on a field of blue, yellow, and red horizontal bands.

Q103001.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), red, and green, with a red rising sun (semicircle with rays) centered on the black band.

Q103019.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and green in the fly, with a vertical white band along the hoist.

Q103037.description: Six equal horizontal bands of black, yellow, red, black, yellow, and red (repeating), with a white disc centered bearing a grey crowned crane facing the hoist.

Q103055.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and red, with a gold crown in the upper hoist on the blue band.

Q103064.description: A wide red horizontal stripe in the center bordered above and below by a thin white stripe and then a broad blue stripe. A red five-pointed star inside a white disc is set on the red stripe near the hoist.

Q103414.description: A red field bordered with six yellow five-pointed stars (three top, three bottom). Inside the border, two yellow triangles meet at the center (one from the top, one from the bottom) and two green triangles meet at the center (one from each side), forming an X pattern. A red disc with a yellow five-pointed star sits at the center. A yellow nutmeg (Grenada's national symbol) is in the hoist-side green triangle.

Q103447.description: Three equal horizontal bands of aquamarine (top), yellow, and aquamarine, with a black equilateral triangle pointing toward the fly from the hoist.

Q104351.description: Three equal vertical bands of ultramarine blue (hoist), gold, and ultramarine blue, with a black trident head (the head of a broken trident) centered on the gold band.

Q105643.description: The national flag of Tuvalu was instated when the country became independent in 1978, after the separation from the Gilbert and Ellice Islands in 1976.

Q108418.description: A white field bearing the seal of Cook County in the center.

Q117758.description: A red field in the upper half bearing a yellow rising sun above a yellow frigatebird in flight. The lower half has six wavy horizontal stripes alternating white and blue (three white, three blue).

Q119605.description: A buff field with the New Jersey coat of arms centered: a shield with three plows, flanked by two female figures, surmounted by a horse's head atop a knight's helmet, with a banner below reading "LIBERTY AND PROSPERITY 1776".

Q121688.description: Three horizontal bands of red, yellow, and red, with the yellow band twice as wide as the red bands, bearing the Spanish coat of arms toward the hoist.

Q122462.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and red, with the Mexican coat of arms (a golden eagle perched on a nopal cactus devouring a serpent) centered on the white band.

Q124020.description: A square red field bearing a white Greek cross (equal-armed) centered.

Q124329.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and black, with a centered yellow emblem of a half cog wheel, machete, and five-pointed star.

Q126622.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red, with the red Islamic Republic emblem (a stylized tulip) centered on the white band, and the Arabic takbir ("Allahu Akbar") repeated 11 times in white Kufic script along the bottom edge of the green band and the top edge of the red band.

Q127155.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a blue isoceles triangle at the hoist extending to the middle of the flag.

Q127179.description: A dark green field with a red disc centered, offset slightly toward the hoist.

Q127296.description: A white field with a red-and-blue circular taegeuk symbol centered, and four black trigrams (sets of three short bars), one in each corner.

Q127974.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and yellow.

Q128347.description: A vertical white stripe at the hoist (about a quarter of the flag's width), with the remaining green field bearing a white crescent moon and a white five-pointed star in the center.

Q128480.description: A white field with two horizontal blue stripes (one near the top, one near the bottom) and a blue Star of David (hexagram) centered.

Q128812.description: A vertical bicolor of green (hoist) and red, with the Portuguese coat of arms (an armillary sphere with a red and white shield bearing five blue escutcheons and seven gold castles) centered over the colour boundary.

Q129132.description: Nine equal horizontal stripes of blue and white alternating (blue at the top and bottom), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a white cross.

Q130442.description: A vertical green band at the hoist, with two horizontal bands in the fly: yellow (top) and red.

Q130449.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white, and red; the white middle band is half the width of each red band (a so-called Latvian carmine triband).

Q130458.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black, with the gold Eagle of Saladin centered on the white band.

Q130481.description: A vertical white band at the hoist with five triangular serrations separating it from the red field that covers the rest of the flag.

Q130774.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue, white, and light blue, with a yellow Sun of May (a sun face with rays) centered on the white band.

Q130807.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and red, with the Slovenian coat of arms in the upper hoist spanning the white and blue bands. The shield depicts Mount Triglav in white on blue, two wavy blue lines below, and three six-pointed golden stars above arranged in an inverted triangle.

Q130811.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow, and red.

Q131147.description: A red field with one large yellow five-pointed star in the upper-left, accompanied by four smaller yellow stars arcing around it.

Q131204.description: A red field with a large yellow five-pointed star centered.

Q131469.description: A vertical bicolor of white (hoist) and red, with a representation of the George Cross (edged in red) in the upper hoist of the white half.

Q131650.description: A sky blue field with a centered yellow sun of 32 rays above a yellow soaring steppe eagle. A vertical yellow band of traditional Kazakh ornamental pattern runs along the hoist.

Q132633.description: A red horizontal band (top) over a green horizontal band, with a vertical white stripe at the hoist bearing a red traditional ornamental pattern.

Q133015.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue, with the Croatian coat of arms (a red-and-white checkerboard shield topped by five smaller shields) centered.

Q133022.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and light blue.

Q134247.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and black, with a vertical red bar at the hoist.

Q134252.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and green, with a yellow five-pointed star centered.

Q134627.description: A horizontal bicolor of royal blue (top) and crimson red (bottom), with a white equilateral triangle at the hoist. In the center of the triangle is a golden-yellow sun with eight primary rays. Each of the triangle's three vertices bears a small five-pointed golden-yellow star.

Q134874.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), yellow, and green, with the Bolivian coat of arms centered on the yellow band.

Q134885.description: Five horizontal stripes of red, white, blue, white, and red; the central blue stripe is twice the width of each of the other four.

Q134933.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), yellow, and red, with a green five-pointed star centered on the yellow band.

Q135034.description: A red field with an inverted isosceles triangle in the center, divided horizontally into three bands of black (top), blue, and white. A yellow rising sun with rays sits centered on the black band.

Q148002.description: Four red horizontal stripes on a yellow field (alternating yellow and red), with a blue equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a white five-pointed star (the independentist Estelada variant).

Q148199.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and green.

Q148807.description: Nine equal horizontal stripes of red and yellow alternating (yellow at the top and bottom), giving four red stripes on a yellow field.

Q154823.description: At the hoist, two equal vertical bands of green and orange on a yellow border. The fly bears a maroon (dark red) rectangle on a yellow border containing a gold passant lion holding a sword, with a gold bo leaf in each corner of the maroon field.

Q156564.description: A dark blue field with eight gold five-pointed stars forming the Big Dipper (seven stars) and Polaris (one star) in the upper portion of the flag.

Q159538.description: A light blue field with a single large white five-pointed star centered.

Q159741.description: Two stacked red triangular pennants joined at the hoist, each bordered in dark blue, forming a non-rectangular pentagonal flag. The upper pennant contains a white crescent moon; the lower contains a white sun with twelve rays.

Q159746.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

Q159865.description: A red field with a green five-pointed star (pentagram) centered, drawn with interlaced lines.

Q159872.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), red, and yellow, with a yellow five-pointed star centered on the red band.

Q159986.description: Seven equal horizontal stripes of green, yellow, red, black, red, yellow, and green, with a white triangle at the hoist bearing a red five-pointed star and a yellow Zimbabwe Bird (soapstone bird sculpture) over the star.

Q160242.description: A light blue field with a horizontal black band edged in white, centered.

Q160250.description: A horizontal green Y-shape fimbriated in white and gold, dividing the flag into red over blue with a black triangle at the hoist; the layout has six colors total: red, blue, green, black, white, and gold.

Q160255.description: Three equal vertical bands of red, white, and red.

Q160260.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist quarter, and four red five-pointed stars edged in white on the fly representing the Southern Cross.

Q160425.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow (top, occupying the upper half), blue (lower quarter), and red (bottom quarter); proportions 2:1:1.

Q160676.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), yellow, and green, with a black five-pointed star centered on the yellow band.

Q160861.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and red, with the Slovak coat of arms (a double cross on three blue hills atop a red shield) placed toward the hoist of center.

Q160872.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a blue square in the upper hoist (the height of the white band) bearing a single white five-pointed star.

Q160877.description: A solid green field bearing a white Arabic inscription (the Islamic shahada) above a white horizontal sword pointing toward the hoist.

Q162033.description: A medium blue field with a yellow right triangle separating it from the hoist. Along the hypotenuse of the triangle is a diagonal line of seven full and two half five-pointed white stars.

Q162781.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black, with the takbir ("Allahu Akbar") in green Kufic script centered on the white band.

Q162789.description: A red field with a white disc centered, bearing a red crescent partly surrounding a red five-pointed star.

Q162980.description: A red field with a wide yellow border, bearing the country's coat of arms centered: a gold double-headed eagle holding a scepter and orb, with a blue shield on its chest showing a gold lion passant on a green field.

Q162999.description: Three horizontal bands of blue (top), red (middle, double width), and blue, with a white silhouette of the three-towered Angkor Wat temple centered on the red band.

Q163008.description: Five equal horizontal stripes of blue and white alternating (three blue, two white), with a red equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a white five-pointed star.

Q163753.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), green, and red, with a large white five-pointed star centered.

Q163832.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), blue, and white, with the lesser coat of arms placed toward the hoist of center.

Q164584.description: A sky blue field with a yellow five-pointed star in the upper hoist canton, and a red diagonal stripe (fimbriated in yellow) running from the lower hoist to the upper fly.

Q165230.description: A red field bearing a yellow hammer crossed with a yellow sickle in the upper hoist, surmounted by a small yellow five-pointed star outlined in yellow.

Q165538.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), blue, and red, with an arc of eight white five-pointed stars centered on the blue band.

Q165542.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow (top, occupying half the height), blue, and red, with the Ecuadorian coat of arms centered on the yellow band.

Q165545.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red, with a black trapezoid (a wedge with a notched edge) at the hoist.

Q165550.description: The national flag of Oman (Arabic: علم عُمان) consists of two horizontal stripes of upper white and lower green, separated by a red horizontal "T" shape in the centre that contains the national emblem of Oman (crossed swords over a khanjar, a traditional curved dagger).

Q165552.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), blue, and red, with a yellow Soyombo emblem (a stylized column of symbols including flame, sun, moon, yin-yang and geometric shapes) centered on the hoist red band.

Q165641.description: A red field with a yellow sun centered, with 40 rays radiating outward. In the center of the sun is a red tündük (the wooden crown of a yurt) rendered as crossed bands within a circle.

Q165811.description: The national flag of Chad is a vertical tricolour of indigo, yellow, and red. It was adopted on 6 November 1959, almost a year after the founding of the autonomous Republic of Chad. Since the 1990s, its similarity to the flag of Romania has caused international discussion.

Q165822.description: A red diagonal band edged in two white stripes runs from the lower hoist to the upper fly, dividing the flag into a blue upper triangle bearing a yellow sun with 12 rays and a green lower triangle.

Q165872.description: A yellow field with two diagonal stripes of white (above) and black running from the upper hoist to the lower fly, with the red Bruneian coat of arms (a winged emblem with hands, a crescent, and a banner of Arabic script) centered.

Q165905.description: Three horizontal bands of black, red, and green separated by thin white fimbriations, with a red, black, and white Maasai shield and two crossed spears centered.

Q167119.description: A red field with a stylized yellow sun in the center, with eight broadening rays extending from the central disc to the edges of the flag.

Q167584.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow, and red, with the Moldovan coat of arms centered on the yellow band: a stylized aurochs head with a star between its horns, flanked by a rose and crescent, on a yellow and blue shield held by an eagle.

Q168711.description: A blue field bearing a gold silhouette of the territory of Kosovo centered, with a row of six white five-pointed stars arching above.

Q168912.description: The national flag of Sierra Leone is a tricolor consisting of three horizontal green, white and blue bands.

Q168917.description: The national flag of the Union of the Comoros was designed in 2001 and officially adopted on 23 December of that year. It continues to display the crescent and four stars, which is a motif that has been in use in various forms since 1975 during the independence movement.

Q168925.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and light blue, with the national coat of arms centered: a shield with three silver towers on three green peaks, topped with a crown, flanked by an oak and a laurel branch, with a scroll below reading "LIBERTAS".

Q168935.description: Fourteen alternating equal horizontal red and white stripes, with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a yellow crescent and a yellow 14-point star.

Q168941.description: A field divided into four equal quarters: white (upper hoist) bearing a blue five-pointed star, red (upper fly), blue (lower hoist), and white (lower fly) bearing a red five-pointed star.

Q169192.description: A blue field with horizontal red stripes at the top and bottom edges. Centered is a large white disc bearing the Belize coat of arms: a shield with logging tools flanked by two woodcutters (one Black, one mestizo), beneath a mahogany tree, encircled by 50 olive leaves with a banner reading "SUB UMBRA FLOREO" below.

Q169903.description: The national flag of Mali is a vertical tricolour of green, gold, and red, the pan-African colours.  The flag of Mali is almost identical to the flag of Guinea, with the exception that the colours are in reverse order.

Q170064.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), white, and green, with a red equilateral triangle on the hoist side bearing a small white seven-pointed star.

Q170289.description: Five horizontal bands of blue, white, red, white, and blue; the central red band is twice as wide as each of the others.

Q170465.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue, with the national coat of arms centered on the white band.

Q170543.description: Three horizontal bands of light blue (top, double width), yellow, and green, with a yellow sun with 24 rays in the upper fly of the blue band.

Q170809.description: Divided by a yellow-edged black diagonal band running from the lower hoist to the upper fly. The upper triangle is green; the lower triangle is light blue.

Q170814.description: A green field with three vertical stripes of red, black, and orange in the lower fly, and an orange African fish eagle in flight above the stripes.

Q171103.description: Nine equal horizontal stripes of white and blue alternating (white at top and bottom). A white canton in the upper hoist bears the Sun of May: a yellow face surrounded by 16 alternating triangular and wavy rays.

Q171117.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) extending to the edges.

Q171124.description: A green field with two superimposed triangles based on the hoist: a white-edged red triangle (the "golden arrowhead") atop a black-edged golden triangle, both pointing toward the fly.

Q172446.description: A light blue field with the white United Nations emblem centered: a polar azimuthal projection of the world map encircled by two olive branches.

Q172517.description: A yellow saltire (diagonal cross) dividing the flag into four triangles: green at the top and bottom, black at the hoist and fly.

Q172530.description: A maroon field with a vertical white serrated band at the hoist forming nine triangular points.

Q172533.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and blue, with the national coat of arms (a triangle containing five volcanoes, a Phrygian cap, and a rainbow) centered on the white band.

Q173535.description: A red field with a blue canton in the upper hoist containing a white sun: a central white disc surrounded by twelve white triangular rays.

Q173548.description: Four equal horizontal bands of red (top), dark blue, yellow, and green.

Q173554.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and blue, with the national coat of arms centered on the white band.

Q174487.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Cayman Islands coat of arms: a shield with three green stars on blue and white wavy bars below a red chief bearing an English lion, surmounted by a green sea turtle on a knight's helm, with a yellow pineapple, and a white banner reading "HE HATH FOUNDED IT UPON THE SEAS".

Q178179.description: Three equal vertical bands of sky blue (hoist), white, and sky blue, with the Guatemalan coat of arms centered on the white band (a resplendent quetzal perched on a scroll, with crossed rifles and crossed swords, framed by a laurel wreath).

Q179383.description:
The national flag of Dominica was adopted on 3 November 1978, with some small changes having been made in 1981, 1988, and 1990. The original flag was designed by playwright Alwin Bully in early 1978 as the country prepared for independence.

It is one of the few flags of sovereign states to contain purple.

Q180725.description: Five horizontal bands of green, white, red (double width), white, and green, with a large yellow five-pointed star centered on the red band.

Q181120.description: Divided diagonally from the lower hoist to the upper fly by a black band edged in yellow. The upper triangle is green; the lower triangle is red. Two white five-pointed stars are placed on the black band.

Q182514.description: A light blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton and the Fijian shield centered in the fly: a white shield with a red Saint George's cross above and quartered scenes (lion, palm tree, dove, sugar cane, coconut) below.

Q182782.description: Three horizontal bands of black (top), red, and green, separated by thin white stripes, with a blue equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a yellow five-pointed star.

Q184265.description: A field divided into four equal quarters by a white cross extending to the edges: blue (upper hoist), red (upper fly), red (lower hoist), and blue (lower fly), with the Dominican coat of arms centered on the cross.

Q184283.description: A red field with a diagonal black stripe (bend) fimbriated in white, running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

Q184584.description: Three vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow (double width), and green, with three green diamond shapes arranged as a V-pattern centered on the yellow band.

Q184596.description: A light blue field with a centered isosceles triangle made of three overlapping triangles: a white outer triangle, a black middle triangle, and a yellow inner triangle at the base.

Q185271.description: A field divided diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly: the upper triangle is red bearing a yellow silhouette of a Raggiana bird-of-paradise; the lower triangle is black bearing five white stars representing the Southern Cross.

Q185277.description: Following the independence of Nauru, the flag of Nauru (Nauruan: anidenin Naoero) was raised for the first time. The flag, chosen in a local design competition, was adopted on independence day, 31 January 1968. The design symbolically depicts Nauru's geographical position, with a star just south of the Equator.

Q185692.description: A horizontal bicolor of white (top) and green, with a large red passant dragon centered.

Q186226.description: A red field bearing the triskelion: three armoured legs joined at the hip, with golden spurs, arranged radially.

Q186456.description: A red field with a centered stylized white five-petaled bauhinia (orchid tree) flower, each petal bearing a small red five-pointed star.

Q188072.description: The national flag of Tonga consists of a red field with a white canton charged with a red couped cross.  Adopted in 1875 after being officially enshrined into the nation's constitution, it has been the flag of the Kingdom of Tonga since that year.  The constitution stipulates that the national flag can never be changed.

Q191731.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), white, and green, with a red equilateral triangle at the hoist.

Q204666.description: A white field bearing a yellow American eagle holding a green olive branch and three blue arrows, with a shield of red and white stripes and a blue chief on its chest. The blue letters "V" and "I" flank the eagle.

Q219726.description: Eight horizontal stripes alternating white, red, and blue (from top), with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton.

Q221881.description: A white field bearing the Massachusetts coat of arms in the center: a blue shield depicting an Algonquian Native American holding a bow and arrow, with a white star in the upper hoist corner. A blue ribbon scroll wraps around the shield.

Q225360.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), green, and red.

Q235475.description: A red field with a green diagonal saltire (Saint Andrew's cross), overlaid by a white upright cross (Saint George's cross).

Q241083.description: A blue field with the state coat of arms centered (a shield supported by a sailor and a miner, with a small "FORWARD" banner above), the word "WISCONSIN" arched above in white, and the date "1848" in white below.

Q241781.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow (double width), and blue, with a red and white Cross of Christ (Order of Christ cross) centered on the yellow band.

Q242502.description: A dark blue field with a white isosceles triangle pointing toward the hoist, edged in red. In the fly half of the triangle's base sits an American bald eagle clutching a war club and a fly-whisk.

Q245269.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Montserrat coat of arms: a shield bearing a green-robed woman (Erin) embracing a Christian cross and holding a golden harp on a black ground.

Q248102.description: A blue field bearing the New Hampshire state seal centered: the frigate USS Raleigh on water, encircled by a green laurel wreath and nine golden stars.

Q258262.description: A sky-blue field bearing an Osage warrior's tan buffalo-hide shield with six small white crosses, decorated with seven pendant eagle feathers. Crossed atop the shield are a calumet (peace pipe) and an olive branch. "OKLAHOMA" appears in white capitals below.

Q285418.description: A dark blue field bearing the Michigan coat of arms in the center: a light blue shield with a man on a peninsula holding a long gun, supported by an elk and a moose, beneath a golden eagle.

Q330517.description: A white field with a wide red stripe along the bottom edge. Centered on the white field is a California grizzly bear walking on a patch of green grass, with a red five-pointed star in the upper-left. The words "CALIFORNIA REPUBLIC" appear in black below the bear.

Q369833.description: A red field with a large white lozenge (diamond) bordered in blue. The blue border contains 25 small white five-pointed stars. Inside the diamond are four blue five-pointed stars: one above the word "ARKANSAS" (in blue capitals) and three below.

Q383109.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly a white disc bearing a light blue Maltese cross surmounted by a red royal crown.

Q390593.description: A white field with the Guadeloupe regional logo centered: a stylized green-and-blue square with a yellow sun and a dark blue arc above, with black text "REGION GUADELOUPE" below the logo, and a small yellow rectangle at the bottom.

Q392167.description: A blue field divided by a white cross (extending to the edges) into four quarters, each bearing a white fleur-de-lis.

Q459788.description: A dark blue field with a white compass rose (a four-pointed star) in the center, encircled by a white ring with four short white lines radiating outward in the cardinal directions.

Q462621.description: Three horizontal bands of green (top), blue, and green, separated by thin black lines; in the center is a white Dhari (traditional headdress) with a white five-pointed star beneath.

Q483659.description: A horizontal bicolor of red (top) and white, with a white crescent moon and a pentagon of five small white five-pointed stars in the upper hoist (canton).

Q483774.description: Three equal horizontal bands of celestial blue (top), white, and green, separated by two thin red fimbriations. In the upper hoist (canton) is a white crescent moon and twelve white five-pointed stars in three rows.

Q492524.description: A blue field with a wide white border framed by an outer red border, bearing a white silhouette of an American bison facing the hoist with the state seal rendered in blue centered on its flank.

Q492541.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and red, with a bald eagle holding a blue streamer reading "OUR LIBERTIES WE PRIZE AND OUR RIGHTS WE WILL MAINTAIN" centered on the white stripe, with "IOWA" in red below.

Q492546.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and blue. Overlaid on the stripes toward the hoist is a large red letter "C" filled with a golden disc.

Q497997.description: A white field with a crimson Saint Andrew's cross (diagonal saltire) extending to the corners.

Q512175.description: A red field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton and the Manitoba provincial shield in the fly: a white shield with a red Saint George's cross above and a brown bison standing on a rock below.

Q520966.description: A white field bearing a gold anchor centered, with a blue ribbon below reading "HOPE" in gold letters. Thirteen gold five-pointed stars are arranged in a circle around the anchor.

Q524824.description: A blue field bearing the Vermont coat of arms centered: a pine tree with mountains in the background, flanked by a cow and sheaves of wheat, framed by green pine boughs, with a red deer head crest above and a red banner reading "FREEDOM AND UNITY VERMONT" below.

Q558375.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white, with the Brandenburg coat of arms centered: a white shield bearing a red eagle with yellow beak, talons, and clover-stem decorations on its wings.

Q567838.description: A medium blue field with a large gold sun centered, containing the state seal in blue and white. "SOUTH DAKOTA" arches above and "THE MOUNT RUSHMORE STATE" arches below in gold.

Q590821.description: A navy blue field with the Commonwealth seal centered. Two figures embrace within the seal, encircled by the words "COMMONWEALTH OF KENTUCKY" above and sprigs of goldenrod below.

Q599323.description: The flag of the Northern Territory was officially adopted in 1978. The Northern Territory has existed as a territory of Australia since 1911, using the Australian National Flag (the Blue Ensign) but did not adopt its own flag until it was granted self-government in 1978.

Q601391.description: Divided vertically into two equal halves: a red field at the hoist bearing a yellow three-towered castle, and a plain white field in the fly.

Q601976.description: A white field bearing a blue saltire extending to the edges, with the royal arms of Scotland (a gold shield with a red lion rampant) centered.

Q605195.description: A red field with a vertical blue stripe along the fly, bordered by a thin white stripe. In the center of the red field is a blue circle bordered in white containing three white five-pointed stars.

Q617649.description: A yellow field bearing a stylized red rooster (the "coq hardi") facing the hoist with one leg raised.

Q618737.description: Alternating vertical stripes of yellow and red.

Q632491.description: Thirteen rays of red and gold alternating in the top half of the flag (six red and seven gold, or vice versa). A copper-colored five-pointed star is centered, with the bottom half of the flag in dark blue.

Q633087.description: A blue field with the state seal centered (a circular scene of mountains, the Great Falls of the Missouri River, plow, miner's tools, and the motto "ORO Y PLATA" on a banner). The word "MONTANA" is in yellow above the seal.

Q637134.description: A horizontal flag divided into three parts: the top third is a Union Jack defaced in the center with a golden crown, while the bottom two-thirds shows a setting golden sun over wavy blue and white horizontal lines.

Q642998.description: A gold (yellow) field with a stylized red sun symbol (the Zia sun) centered: a central red disc with four groups of four straight rays radiating outward in the cardinal directions.

Q663111.description: Five horizontal bands of blue (top), white, yellow (narrow), white, and red.

Q669141.description: Coloplast A/S is a Danish multinational company that develops, manufactures and markets medical devices and services related to ostomy, urology, continence, and wound care.

Q673117.description: A blue field with a gold flaming torch centered, surrounded by a ring of thirteen gold five-pointed stars with five additional stars in an inner arc. A nineteenth larger star sits above the torch flame, with the word "INDIANA" arched above it in gold.

Q676623.description: Three horizontal stripes of red, white, and red, with a blue canton in the upper hoist containing a ring of 13 white five-pointed stars encircling the state coat of arms in gold. "IN GOD WE TRUST" appears below the coat of arms.

Q687062.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and black, with the Saxony-Anhalt coat of arms centered: a shield divided into a black and gold bendy field with a green crancelin (curved wreath) above and a red battlement with a black bear below.

Q687222.description: The flag of the German State of North Rhine-Westphalia is a horizontal tricolor consisting of green, white and red.

Q693558.description:
The provincial flag of Saskatchewan was adopted in 1969. Its upper half is green and contains the coat of arms of Saskatchewan, and its lower half is yellow. In the fly of the flag is a western red lily, the provincial flower. 

In 2017, The Minister of Parks, Culture and Sports designated 22 September as Saskatchewan Flag Day.

Q693701.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and green.

Q693717.description: The flag of Saarland is based on the flag of Germany and is a black, red, and gold horizontal tricolor. In the center of the flag is the coat of arms of Saarland. The flag of Saarland is both the civil flag (Landesflagge), as well as the state service flag (Landesdienstflagge).

Q693758.description: The flag of Rhineland-Palatinate, also known as Rhineland-Pfalz, is a tricolor of three horizontal bands of black, red and gold.  These colors are Germany's national colors and are sometimes referred to as schwarz-rot-gold.  In the canton, or the upper left corner, is the coat of arms of the state of Rhineland-Palatinate.

Q698379.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and red, with the Schleswig-Holstein coat of arms centered: a shield divided vertically, the hoist half yellow bearing two blue lions, the fly half red bearing a white nettle leaf.

Q707471.description: A field of white and blue lozenges (diamond shapes) in an angled diagonal pattern.

Q725122.description: Laakdal (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈlaːɡdɑl]) is a municipality located in the Belgian province of Antwerp. Laakdal was founded in 1977 out of a merger of the towns Veerle, Eindhout and Vorst. The municipality now comprises the towns of Eindhout, Veerle, Vorst, Varendonk and Vorst-Meerlaar (also known as Klein-Vorst).

Q730106.description: A red saltire (diagonal cross) on a white field, with the state seal of Florida superimposed at the center.

Q731163.description: A dark green field with the Washington state seal centered: a portrait of George Washington encircled by the words "THE SEAL OF THE STATE OF WASHINGTON 1889" in gold.

Q734071.description: A blue field bearing the Nebraska state seal centered, rendered in gold and silver.

Q736625.description: Three horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and red (the white band wider than the others). On the white band is a gold-outlined blue hexagon containing a gold beehive above a five-pointed white star.

Q752557.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue, with the Missouri state coat of arms centered.

Q752559.description: A red, white, and blue swallowtail (triangular-cut) flag. Two horizontal red stripes top and bottom flank a white middle stripe, with a blue triangular peak at the hoist bearing 13 white stars around a red disc.

Q752562.description: A cobalt blue field with the state seal in the upper hoist quarter: a silver wreath of sagebrush with two yellow scrolls reading "BATTLE BORN" above and "NEVADA" below, around a white five-pointed star.

Q752566.description: A colonial blue field with a buff-colored diamond centered bearing the Delaware coat of arms (a farmer and a militiaman flanking a shield with cattle, wheat, and a ship, with a banner reading "LIBERTY AND INDEPENDENCE"). Below the diamond the date "DECEMBER 7, 1787" appears in white.

Q752569.description: A heraldic banner of arms divided into four quarters: two quarters bear the black and gold paly-bendy arms of the Calvert family; the other two bear the red and white quartered cross bottony of the Crossland family.

Q752573.description: A royal blue field bearing a white baroque shield with three grapevines, each carrying three bunches of purple grapes, with a white banner below reading "QUI TRANSTULIT SUSTINET".

Q752837.description: A white field bearing the central elements of the state seal: a bald eagle in profile perched on a rock, wings uplifted, holding a shield and a banner in its beak, with a rising sun over water in the background. The word "Illinois" appears below.

Q760401.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and green, with the Andalusian coat of arms (a standing figure of Hercules between two pillars and two lions) optionally centered on the white band.

Q763140.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and black, with the Extremadura coat of arms centered on the white band: a quartered shield with a yellow lion, a castle, a holm oak, and blue waves, surmounted by a gold royal crown.

Q774799.description: Four equal horizontal red bands on a yellow field (alternating yellow and red stripes), with the Aragonese coat of arms centered: a quartered shield bearing the cross of Sobrarbe, the cross of Iñigo Arista, two Moors' heads, and the Aragon pales, surmounted by a gold crown.

Q782773.description: A white field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Southern Cross constellation (five seven-pointed blue stars) plus a larger Commonwealth Star (a seven-pointed blue star) in the lower hoist.

Q783490.description: The Flag of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations or the ASEAN Flag is one of the official symbols of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN). It consists of the official emblem of ASEAN on a blue background.

Q819691.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top, narrow), white (wide), and red (bottom, narrow), with a black bear rampant facing the hoist slightly left of center on the white band.

Q828147.description: A dark blue field at the hoist in the shape of the state of Minnesota bearing an eight-pointed white star, with the rest of the flag a light blue field.

Q830262.description: A red field with a golden five-pointed crown above two white square crosses, the three emblems stacked vertically and offset toward the hoist.

Q843879.description: A white field with a navy blue border, bearing the state coat of arms centered: two men flanking a rock inscribed "June 20, 1863" with mining and farming tools, surrounded by a wreath of green rhododendron with red flowers, beneath a red banner reading "STATE OF WEST VIRGINIA" and above a red ribbon reading "MONTANI SEMPER LIBERI".

Q933011.description: Four red horizontal stripes on a yellow field in the fly, with a vertical blue band at the hoist decorated with yellow acanthus-leaf ornament. A vertical column of red, white, and green roundels and small enameled charges runs between the blue band and the striped field.

Q938601.description: A white field with a celestial blue diagonal band running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

Q1049334.description: A white field bearing the USACE castle emblem centered: a red diamond outlined in grey containing a stylized red castle (three towers and a connecting wall) over a small white globe.

Q1064042.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and a white disc on the fly bearing a red Saint George's cross with a gold lion passant guardant in the center and an eight-pointed gold star on each arm.

Q1073663.description: A field divided into four quarters: a red quarter with a golden three-towered castle (upper hoist and lower fly) alternating with a white quarter bearing a purple lion rampant (upper fly and lower hoist).

Q1073859.description: A white field with four wavy ribbons (two red, two blue) radiating from a central blue and white four-pointed star with an orange disc, toward the four corners. Above the star sits the symbol of Ashur (a winged sun disc above a male figure).

Q1084035.description: A white field with a small blue canton in the upper hoist containing a red Latin cross.

Q1087030.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with the Cantabria coat of arms centered: a red shield bearing the white Torre de Hércules tower beside a blue sailing ship on blue waves, surmounted by a gold royal crown, with a grey medallion below.

Q1094206.description: The flag of Piedmont is one of the official symbols of the region of Piedmont in Italy. The current flag was adopted on 24 November 1995.

Q1122078.description: A dark blue field bearing the Alberta provincial coat of arms centered: a shield with a red Saint George's cross above a white sky, blue snowy mountains, green hills, and a golden wheat field.

Q1130142.description: Six vertical stripes in blue, yellow, red, white, orange, and a sixth band combining all five colors.

Q1131266.description: The flag of Lombardy is one of the official symbols of the region of Lombardy, Italy. The current flag was officially adopted on 4 February 2019, although it has been used de facto since 12 June 1975.

Q1165949.description: A red field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the Ontario shield (cross of Saint George above three gold maple leaves on green) centered on the fly.

Q1193967.description: A square field made of a 7x7 grid of colored squares, with the rainbow colors (white, yellow, orange, red, purple, blue, green) arranged diagonally to form stripes running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

Q1285625.description: Two equal horizontal bands of black (top) and red, with a large yellow disc (sun) centered.

Q1402799.description: Three horizontal white bands separated by two light-blue bands, with four red six-pointed stars centered on the broad middle white band.

Q1414813.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and orange, with the New York City seal in blue centered on the white band.

Q1418784.description: A horizontal flag divided in thirds. The top third is a red field bearing a gold lion passant; the bottom two-thirds is a gold field with a black lymphad (medieval ship) above blue and white wavy horizontal lines.

Q1426515.description: A crimson red field with seven white five-pointed stars arranged in two rows (four above, three below) representing the seven historical districts of Madrid.

Q1426561.description: The flag of the Northwest Territories is the subnational flag of the Northwest Territories of Canada. It was adopted in 1969 by the Legislative Assembly of the Northwest Territories.

Q1463762.description: A black field with a white silhouette of a head in profile, a guard tower, and a strand of barbed wire, with the text "POW * MIA" above and "YOU ARE NOT FORGOTTEN" below.

Q1502989.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands), with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton.

Q1740429.description: A yellow field with three horizontal red stripes through the middle.

Q1788743.description: A square red field bearing a blue saltire (diagonal cross) edged in white, with thirteen white five-pointed stars arranged along the saltire's arms.

Q1856088.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and green.

Q1882040.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow (top), red (middle, narrower), and yellow.

Q1919103.description: A black field bearing a white cross extending to the edges.

Q2020381.description: A yellow field bearing a black griffin rampant facing the hoist, with a red tongue.

Q2029729.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), black, and green.

Q2052320.description: A yellow field bearing a red diagonal band (bend) running from the upper hoist to the lower fly, charged with three white alerions (heraldic eagles without beaks or feet).

Q2156111.description: A white field bearing the San Luis coat of arms centered: a green laurel wreath surrounding an oval scene of red mountains under a yellow sun with a blue sky, with two deer on a green plain below.

Q2169543.description: A field bordered with a decorative copper and gold pattern, bearing a central panel with a winged golden lion of Saint Mark (gold body, white wings, halo) on a dark blue ground holding an open book. A vertical column of seven small coats of arms (one for each Venetian province) runs along the fly.

Q2283932.description: Four equal horizontal bands of white (top), red, white, and red, with a blue square in the upper hoist (the height of two stripes) bearing a white isosceles triangle pointing upward.

Q2345639.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

Q2361008.description: A solid dark blue field with a single large white five-pointed star centered.

Q2403145.description: Two equal horizontal bands of light blue (top) and green, separated by a thin red line, with a centered emblem of a yellow sun (with a red bottom half) inside a blue gear, surrounded by a green laurel wreath.

Q2474848.description: A blue field bearing a stylized white-edged grey iris flower centered, with two yellow petals at the base.

Q2508330.description: A triangular saffron (or navy blue) flag bearing a black Khanda emblem (a double-edged sword between two curved kirpans circling a chakkar) centered. A tassel hangs from the fly point.

Q2584616.description: A field of alternating white and blue wavy horizontal bands, with the Zeeland coat of arms centered: a yellow shield bearing a red lion rising from blue and white waves, surmounted by a crowned crest.

Q2586101.description: A white field divided by a green Nordic-style cross (shifted toward the hoist), with the upper hoist quarter red, upper fly blue, lower hoist blue, and lower fly red.

Q2616930.description: A yellow field bearing a red lion rampant outlined in black, facing the hoist.

Q2661050.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

Q2777623.description: A blue field at the hoist and a green field in the fly, with a stylized white "O" (Ottawa monogram) overlapping the boundary between the two colors.

Q2897956.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and red, with a small yellow five-pointed star in the upper portion of the blue band.

Q3039030.description: A royal blue pennant on a white field or background with a white circle on a blue pennant divided by four parts; each of the four parts of the circle containing a blue symbol, a building; a cogged wheel and steel square; a ship's wheel; a microscope.

Q3039032.description:
The flag of Milwaukee was adopted by its Common Council in 1954.

The flag of Milwaukee is little-used around the city; the city only owns twenty flags which are displayed at various city-owned buildings. A 2004 survey by the North American Vexillological Association rated the Milwaukee flag 147th out of 150 flags of major American cities.

Q3039109.description: A red field bearing two gold lions stacked one above the other, both facing the hoist, with blue claws and tongues.

Q3633963.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) extending to the edges.

Q4042567.description: Lalandia is the name of three Danish holiday resorts owned by Parken Sport & Entertainment. The original Lalandia Rødby is located in Rødbyhavn, with additional activity centres in Billund (2009) and Søndervig (2022).

Q4876605.description: 7 equal horizontal stripes with bark brown and the top, white in the middle, and black on the bottom. The other stripes have colors in between. Abear paw silhouette covers the upper left quadrant.

Q4889892.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing thirteen white seven-pointed stars arranged in an arc around the large white numerals "76".

Q4898324.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing thirteen white five-pointed stars arranged in a circle.

Q5456699.description: A red field with the city coat of arms in the hoist (a shield divided into a blue field with a white fleur-de-lis and a white field with a castle, beneath a Union Jack chief), and "Baton Rouge" in large flowing white script across the fly.

Q5456713.description: A dark blue field with a large white sunburst (white lightning-bolt rays and stars radiating outward) centered, surrounding a small circular blue-and-white scene of a ship and waterfront.

Q5456721.description: A white field crossed by four wavy blue horizontal stripes representing the Ohio River. Centered is a large red letter "C" enclosing a white disc bearing the Latin motto "JUNCTA JUVANT" above a balance scale, a sword, and a caduceus. A small red mural crown sits above the C.

Q5456787.description: Three horizontal bands of red (narrow, top), white (wide, middle), and dark blue (narrow, bottom), with three gold fleurs-de-lis arranged in a triangle (two above, one below) centered on the white band.

Q5456894.description: A blue field bearing the U.S. Air Force coat of arms in the center: a shield with 13 white stars and a crest including a North American bald eagle, a cloud formation, and a wreath of six alternating folds of silver and blue.

Q5456895.description: A white field with a dark blue Great Seal of the United States in the center. "UNITED STATES COAST GUARD" arcs in dark blue above the eagle; the motto "SEMPER PARATUS" and "1790" appear beneath in dark blue.

Q5456897.description: A scarlet red field bearing the Marine Corps emblem centered: a gold eagle perched on a globe (showing the Western Hemisphere with black-and-white horizontal stripes across the Americas), with a gold fouled anchor crossed behind. A white scroll in the eagle's beak reads "SEMPER FIDELIS". Below the emblem, a white ribbon banner reads "UNITED STATES MARINE CORPS" in red letters.

Q5456898.description: A white field bearing a blue replica of the War Office Seal in the center. Below the seal is a broad scarlet scroll with "United States Army" in white letters, with "1775" in blue Arabic numerals beneath.

Q5456899.description: A dark blue field with the seal of the U.S. Department of the Navy in the center. A yellow scroll inscribed "United States Navy" in dark blue lettering appears below the seal.

Q9260246.description: A white field with two horizontal blue stripes (one wide, one narrow) in the lower half, and the city coat of arms in the upper hoist (a red shield bearing a white sword crossed with two yellow fish).

Q10986849.description: The flag that is used as the symbol of Kashubia, a region in Central Europe, and the Kashubian people, is divided horizontally into black and yellow stripes.

Q12143337.description: A red field bearing a single gold lion facing the hoist, with blue claws and tongue.

Q12143656.description: A flag divided into three sections: the larger left section bears alternating vertical yellow and red stripes (the Provençal pattern); the upper right is a yellow field with a blue dolphin (the Dauphiné dolphin); the lower right is a white field with a red eagle on three blue waves (the arms of Nice).

Q12373049.description: A blue field bearing a white cross extending to the edges (the horizontal arm slightly above center).

Q14515865.description: Five horizontal bands of red, blue, yellow, green, and white (top to bottom).

Q14753997.description: Two equal horizontal bands of green (top) and white.

Q15994084.description: Five equal horizontal stripes of red and white alternating (red at the top and bottom), with a blue equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a single white five-pointed star.

Q16630001.description: A red field bearing a white Greek cross extending to the edges of the flag.

Q23925186.description: A yellow field bearing a black double-headed eagle holding a sword and a globus cruciger, surmounted by a crown.

Q29344371.description: Arnold Clark is a car dealer based in Glasgow, Scotland. As of 2025, the company has over 200 dealerships across the United Kingdom, and is one of the largest car dealerships in Europe. Annually, Arnold Clark sells in excess of 300,000 vehicles, and sells new vehicles from over 30 international countries.

Q30715977.description: A vertical bicolor of red (hoist) and white, with the Vendée heraldic emblem (a stylized red and white double Sacred Heart topped by a small crown and cross) centered across the boundary.

Q30909105.description: A red field with a white (silver) lion rampant facing the hoist. Across the top of the flag is a horizontal blue chief bearing three gold fleurs-de-lis.

Q47013273.description: Five equal horizontal bands of light blue, pink, white, pink, and light blue.

Q62673928.description: The current flag of San Jose, California, features a triband of gold on top, white in the middle, and blue on the bottom with the city's official seal in the center. It has been the official flag since 1984.

Q62920304.description: A yellow field bearing three red Latin (cross-bottony style) crosses arranged in a triangle (two above, one below), with a stylized red Christogram or chair-like emblem centered.

Q62931620.description: A blue field bearing a centered scalloped yellow circular border around a black ring of small yellow stars, enclosing a large red letter "H" with a small crown above it.

Q63063601.description: Two horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with "SANTA CLARA" in red letters arched above a centered round seal of the City of Santa Clara, California showing the Mission and "The Mission City" inscription.

Q63874022.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white, and red, with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a circle of white five-pointed stars.

Q63874423.description: A white field with small gold fleurs-de-lis in regular rows.

Q63991554.description: A white field with a large red Greek cross centered.

Q64300176.description: A solid red field with the McDonald's golden "M" arches logo centered.

Q66371866.description: A white field divided by a black cross, with the city arms in the upper hoist quarter (red field with a yellow caravel on green waves) and four ermine spots arranged in each of the other three quarters.

Q70119112.description: A white field with the Hampton Inn & Suites logo centered: an elongated blue hexagonal badge edged in red, with the words "Hampton Inn & Suites" in white script and "by HILTON" in white below.

Q74484535.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red, with a yellow crescent and seven-pointed star centered on the white band and a white kris (wavy-bladed sword) centered on the red band.

Q94652289.description: A black field with the Space Force delta emblem centered (a silver upward-pointing arrowhead in front of a blue globe with white grid lines, an orbit ring, and a white polestar above), surrounded by small white stars. Below, in white, "UNITED STATES SPACE FORCE" with "MMXIX" beneath.

Q96633914.description: Six equal horizontal stripes of the rainbow pride flag (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, violet) with a triangular chevron at the hoist containing additional stripes: black, brown, light blue, light pink, and white.

Q96676582.description: A black and white US flag (stars on black field at the hoist, alternating black and white horizontal stripes) with one stripe replaced by a horizontal blue line.

Q98027472.description: A white field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Southern Cross constellation (four red five-pointed stars in a cross pattern plus a smaller fifth).

Q98055852.description: A circle of twelve five-pointed yellow stars on a blue field.

Q98400609.description: A light blue field bearing two diagonal stripes (one blue, one white, edged in white) running from the upper fly to the lower hoist, with a green triangular wedge in the lower hoist corner.

Q98538622.description: A solid red field with the white wordmark "REWE" centered in large bold letters.

Q98609686.description: Divided into three horizontal sections (black top, white middle, red bottom) by a stylized white koru (spiral fern frond) that curls from the hoist into the fly.

Q100711795.description: A white field bearing a green circle (with a light blue inner area) containing a green tree silhouette, and the words "TREE CITY USA" in green below.

Q104864896.description: A flag quartered into four equal sections: the upper hoist is white with red crenellations and gold fleurs-de-lis on white; the upper fly is blue with a gold lion rampant on a field of gold billets; the lower hoist is blue with a gold lion rampant on a field of gold billets; the lower fly bears the diagonal blue and yellow bands of Burgundy edged in red.

Q106498465.description: A red field divided by a white Scandinavian-style cross (shifted toward the hoist), with a white fish (rouget) charge in the upper hoist quarter.

Q106498503.description: A white field with 6 alternating white (top) and blue horizontal blue stripes of equal width.

Q106498510.description: A vertical bicolor of red (hoist) and yellow.

Q106498686.description: A vertical bicolor of yellow (hoist) and red.

Q106498712.description: A blue field bearing a yellow Nordic-style cross (with the vertical arm shifted toward the hoist).

Q106500988.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and red.

Q106501478.description: A horizontal bicolor of red (top) and green.

Q106501701.description: A red field bearing the city's coat of arms centered: a blue shield with gold fleurs-de-lis surmounted by a crowned crest. Text on a banner below.

Q112963962.description: Alternating vertical stripes of red and yellow, with a centered blue shield bearing a smaller white shield with red roundels. There is a yellow key and a yellow cross above and below the inner shield respectively.

Q112964480.description: A green field with "CANCALE" arched in white letters at the top, and the city coat of arms centered: a light blue shield bearing a white sailing boat between yellow shellfish (oysters), with a black eagle in the upper hoist and surmounted by a gold crown.

Q113361764.description: A red field with a large white sixteen-pointed star (the Star of the Magi) centered.

Q113410900.description: Diagonal stripes of yellow and red running from upper hoist to lower fly.

Q113518795.description: A blue field bearing the FBI seal centered: a circular gold rope border around a blue disc inscribed "DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE / FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION" with thirteen gold stars and the FBI shield (red, white, and blue stripes with laurel branches) in the center.

Q113519122.description: A blue field with and eagle standing on a shield facing to the left. The bird is holding arrows and olive branches. There is text above and below. The lower text is on a waving banner. Top text reads "DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE". The bottom text is latin and reads "QUI DOMINA JUSTITIA SEQUITUR".

Q114243922.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross. The upper hoist quarter is blue and divided by a smaller red cross into four sub-quarters, each bearing a white eight-pointed star.

Q116486314.description: A blue field bearing a large yellow letter "M" centered, with four white fleurs-de-lis arranged around it (one above, one below, one to each side).

Q122965273.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and red.

Q123102467.description: A red field bearing the Occitanie regional logo in yellow at the hoist (a stylized Occitan cross with a column of pellets) and white text reading "La Région / Occitanie / Pyrénées - Méditerranée" in the fly.
